testCases.title: Admin — Configurable Product in Catalog
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat visible in admin Catalog module as configurable product type. Product has multiple sections/properties defining configuration options. Admin Catalog shows product type as 'Configurable'.

testCases.title: Admin — Configuration Sections Setup
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat has 4 sections: (1) Select your fav color [radiogroup], (2) Select print-ready cap [radiogroup], (3) Customize text for your cap [text input, maxLength=255], (4) Add photo [file upload]. Sections match storefront PDP rendering.

testCases.title: Admin — Color Options Configuration
testCases.notes: Color radiogroup options: Black hat (+$10), Beige hat (+$500), Green hat (+$18), Red hat (+$14), None ($0). Per project memory (project_configurable_text_section_validation.md): options serialize by optionId reference. VCST-4713: Black hat $10 + base $10 = $20 total.

testCases.title: Admin — Text Section maxLength Configuration
testCases.notes: Text section (Customize text for your cap) configured with maxLength=255. Per project memory: maxLength applies to Custom input only, NOT to preset option labels. Storefront text input enforces maxLength=255 constraint.

testCases.title: Admin — File Upload Section Configuration
testCases.notes: File upload section (Add photo) configured as file input type. Admin defines file type restrictions and size limits. Storefront renders file input element allowing image uploads.

testCases.title: Admin — Base Price Configuration
testCases.notes: Configurable Hat base price: $10.00. Option prices are additive to base price. Black hat: $10 (base) + $10 (option) = $20.00 total. Price calculation verified in suite 072 (VCST-4713).

testCases.title: Admin — Configurable Product SKU Management
testCases.notes: Configurable product has parent SKU and option-based child SKUs. Admin Catalog manages SKU structure. Configuration selections generate unique SKU variants for cart/order line items.

testCases.title: Admin — Product Indexing for Configurable Products
testCases.notes: Configurable products indexed for search (Suite 061). Configurable Hat appears in search results. Index includes base product and option data. VCST-4713 price indexed correctly after fix.

testCases.title: Admin — Inventory per Configuration
testCases.notes: Configurable products track inventory per variant/option combination. Admin Inventory module shows stock per SKU variant. BOPIS availability checked per fulfillment center per variant.

testCases.title: Admin — Configurable Product Pricing Rules
testCases.notes: Pricing module supports configurable product option pricing. Option price modifiers (+ amount) stored per option. Admin Pricing can apply price lists to configurable product options. Per suite 054 (Pricing Logic).

testCases.title: Admin — Create New Configuration Section
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Adding new configuration section to Configurable Hat via admin deferred. Changes would affect live storefront product. Configuration section creation not executed.

testCases.title: Admin — Edit Configuration Options
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Editing option prices or labels (e.g., Beige hat price change) deferred. Changes affect live storefront and pricing assertions.

testCases.title: Admin — Text Section Preset Options
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Per project memory (project_vcst_4987_pending_updates.md): text-section preset coverage test updates deferred until VCST-4987 fix ships. Admin text section preset configuration not tested.

testCases.title: Admin — Configurable Product Page Builder Integration
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Configurable product page-level CMS/Builder.io integration for custom layout deferred. Requires admin Content module inspection of PDP templates. Not distinguished from standard product pages in this run.

testCases.title: Admin — Configurable Product in B2B Context
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Verifying configurable product admin settings specific to B2B org pricing (BuildRight-specific price list for configurable products) not executed. B2B-specific configuration pricing deferred to Suite 054/055.
